title: Normalize item IDs and namespaced forms in one place
description:
Council finding: Goal creation normalization is inconsistent for namespaced items. TryMakeBuiltInSpec in GoalFactory normalizes (ToLowerInvariant + Replace('-', '_')) but only in the built-in fallback path. The item registry path passes raw itemId. Different consumers handle namespace prefixes differently.

Fix:
1. Create a shared NormalizeItemId(string raw) → string helper
2. Use it consistently across: GoalFactory, WorldStateProjector (inventory normalization), creative provisioning, recovery parsing
3. Ensure "minecraft:oak_log" and "oak_log" produce the same result
4. Add tests for: namespace stripping, hyphen normalization, case normalization, mixed forms

Referenced in: Data/Pages/council/2026-06-30-external-audits-council.md
Audit source: Audit A
